vote_descriptions.Bland Allison Act: TO CONCUR IN SENATE AMENDMENT TO H.R. 1093 SAID AMENDMENT STRIKING THE PROVISION PERMITTING THE COINAGE OF SILVER BULLION AT A U.S. MINT OR ASSAY OFFICE ON SAME TERMS AND CONDITIONS AS COINAGE OF GOLD BULLION.
vote_descriptions.Hold Jefferson Davis in Treason: TO PASS A RESOLUTION PROVIDING THAT JEFFERSON DAVIS, LEADER OF THE LATE REBELLION, IS GUILTY OF TREASON AND WAS CHARGED BY PROCLAMATION OF PRESIDENT MAY 18, 1865, - RESOLVED THAT DAVIS BE HOLD IN CUSTODY AS A PRISONER, SUBJECT TO TRIAL ACCORDING TO LAWS.  (P. 3089)
vote_descriptions.Andrew Johnson Impeachment: TO ADOPT THE ORDER TO HAVE 11TH ARTICLE OF IMPEACHMENT READ FIRST, AND OTHER IN THE USUAL ORDER, THE QUESTION GUILTY OR NOT GUILTY BEING PUT ON EACH PART OF 11TH ARTICLE AND OTHER IN ORDER.  (P. 411-1)
